programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E118 - The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: E121 - The Loudest Yard / Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln’s mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln’s fortune and claims his day will “end in disaster”, Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

programme.title: E122 - Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It’s the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln’s sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E720 - Riddle School / Love Me Tenor
programme.desc: The Action News team springs into action to figure out who is behind a mysterious string of pranks. // When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: E207 - Secret Beef
programme.desc: With an invitation to Swellview's most exclusive restaurant, Henry decides to bring his boss, Ray, but finds it more complicated than expected.

programme.title: E208 - Henry's Jelly
programme.desc: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing.

programme.title: E114 - Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: E120 - Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: E110 - Hand-Me-Downer / Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E208 - Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: E104 - iNevel
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by 'Nevelocity', a really popular website that reviews websites and webcasts. When Carly goes to meet Nevel, she finds out he is an annoying boy who wants to date her.

programme.title: E109 - #RevengeOfTheBritBrats
programme.desc: British con artists Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on to this, they turn the tables on Gwen and Ruby.

programme.title: E802 - Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E123
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Starring Ashida Mana and Okayama Amane, with a script by Okada Yoshikazu, this two‑night special drama follows a young woman whose longtime crush suddenly returns to their hometown. He chooses not to go back to Tokyo and instead works at his family's tofu shop, where she also has a part‑time job, and her days gradually fill with quiet joy. Feelings live not only in romance, but also in work, in dreams, and in life itself, and everything begins with those feelings. Set in Morioka, this is a gentle and heartfelt story about the beauty found in one‑sided love.

The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Whilst humans are prone to fighting the inevitability of ageing, trees have perfected the art of aging gracefully. In this episode, we will discover how mature trees do incredible things to thrive in an often turbulent world, and may even work together to do so.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... The Mountain
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Mountain. He has a nasty itch that he just can't scratch and it's up to Henry to save the day.

programme.title: Lava Lamp
programme.desc: You'll lava this one. We'll show you how to use a bottle and oil in this make that bubbles and boils.

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: A Magic Curve Ball
programme.desc: In so called ‘string art', straight lines are drawn that look like curved lines. In this episode, Eric tries to do the same. What mathematical principles form the basis of string art and will Eric succeed?

programme.title: Another Busy Day
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are removing a big lump from a dog's spleen, helping a cow give birth, and chasing down super-speedy birds at a theme park.

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Science on the Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Philippe travels to Australia and goes diving at the Great Barrier Reef. He sees deadly creatures at James Cook University, and visits the National Sea Simulator at the Australian Institute of Marine Science.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: A New Boy in Town
programme.desc: The ice-dancing girls are desperate for boy partners, and new boy Adriano is moving from Italy to Nottingham to find himself a dance partner. Nine-year-old Charlie lives and breathes ice hockey, but has he got what it takes to impress the coach?

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Plastic Bag
programme.desc: Why throw the plastic bags away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite things to do.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: The Raucous Racket
programme.desc: Addison, Kevin and Tess are trying to make a rap music video for Ayrton Park's Summer Fest Movie Night, but a persistent very LOUD buzzing from above keeps ruining everything! Addison sets out to solve the mystery of what's making all the noise.

programme.title: The Static-y Shuffle Stumper
programme.desc: When Tess and Alex suddenly start getting electric shocks for no apparent reason, Addison has to solve the mystery or it will be lights out on their act for the school talent competition.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Fur Removal Spray
programme.desc: DiktaThor creates a homemade hair remover to overtake Bhilka. To beat DiktaThor, Sprinter needs help from a brave furless friend to save the day. But who could it be?

programme.title: Superfan
programme.desc: The official 'Sprinter Galore - fan club' wants to pay tribute to the superhero. A big party is planned, but when the villain Cleopatra turns out to be a member, the festivities suddenly become suspicious.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Grounded
programme.desc: Naomi is confined to her room without communication devices, and relies on Carol to run messages back and forth to Claybook so she can keep up with what's going on in her complex social life. But chaos hits when the boy she likes chooses that exact day to get in touch.

programme.title: Alex Goulding and Jimmy Choi: Feats of Strength Duo
programme.desc: Ninja warrior Jimmy and fitness fanatic Alex reveal how they worked together to achieve the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most consecutive double high-five push-ups! The powerful duo meets Aisheshek Magauina and shares what it takes to work as a team.

programme.title: Space Shuttle Documentary
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle program spanned 30 years, and accomplished many things in low-Earth orbit. Host Emily Calandrelli speaks with five astronauts who ventured into space aboard this amazing and complex spacecraft.

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

programme.title: Starting Over
programme.desc: Kirsten and Finn are preparing for the biggest season of their lives, and Phoebe has a new routine to master.

programme.desc: 《一站到底》升級進入競速時代，答題拼速度，輸贏靠積分! 選手對決人數由10人變為8人，首度開啟搶答模式，除站位獎外再增豐富答題連擊獎，連續守擂三期的選手更有機會獲得高薪工作機會。

programme.title: E11 - 糖尿病視網膜病變
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E5 - 新人空降攪亂CP關係
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E6 - 潘瑋柏為吳昕做早餐
programme.desc: 三對明星情侶：內地演員鄭愷與圈外女友程曉玥，台灣歌手潘瑋柏搭檔內地女主持吳昕，台灣演員明道搭檔內地女演員王鷗；還有素人情侶加入，一起修煉愛情，傳遞正能量。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E3 - 攜手踏上茶馬古道
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E14 -Finito!
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: Animal Invaders - The Battle Against Unwanted Species
programme.desc: Invasive species threaten flora and fauna and can destroy ecological balance. However, combating these dangerous invaders is costly and requires unusual measures.

programme.title: Svalbard: Russia's Arctic 'Trump Card' Against Nato
programme.desc: The remote island group of Svalbard - it is NATO territory but a hundred-year-old treaty grants access to dozens of countries - including Russia. And Russia is using it to build up a strategic foothold in the Arctic.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. programme.title: E1 - Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. programme.title: E67
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!
programme.desc: From the costume workshop to the sets and the accessory stockroom, a tour of the Liege Opera where ''Traviata'' is performed. Also featuring director Jean-Marie Poire, landscape designer Alexandre Vandiest, Patrick Syen's Bentleys, and soprano Louise Foor.

E17
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: Shinjuku Incident
programme.desc: The foreign migrant communities in Tokyo live shadowy lives. The Japanese neither acknowledge nor welcome them. They are shunned by the mainstream society, hounded by the yakuza, and go about their days under fear of being discovered and repatriated. It is an alien world for Steelhead – an honest, hardworking tractor repairman. Steelhead had decided to take the perilous journey to Tokyo after he lost contact with his girlfriend, who had arrived in the city earlier.
